summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Data Farm single-page corporate website. All core features working correctly including animated visualizations, smooth navigation, mobile responsiveness, and CTA functionality.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with animated area chart visualization
Navigation links (Home, About, Services, Why Us, Contact) provide smooth scrolling to sections
About section displays company info with interactive bar chart
Services section shows 3 service cards (Data Analysis, Research, Consulting) with proper icons and descriptions
Why Choose Us section displays 4 feature cards with icons (Database, Zap, Globe, Shield)
Stats section with animated counters (500+, 50+, 1M+, 10+) using CountUp library
Contact section displays email (harvest@datafarm.co.tz), phone (+255 759 751 564), address (Dar es Salaam, Tanzania)
Footer displays with social links (Twitter, Instagram, Facebook) and company information
Mobile menu works on smaller screens with hamburger button and overlay navigation
Get Started CTA button navigates to contact section
Hero CTA buttons ('Our Services', 'Contact Us') navigate to respective sections
Contact section 'Start a Conversation' CTA opens email client
Responsive design works across desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844)
Animated floating data nodes (15 total) in hero background
Brand colors correctly implemented (Deep Navy Blue #1a2b5f, Mint Green #8ee4af)
Recharts visualizations render properly with gradients and hover effects
Framer Motion animations work for section transitions
Glassmorphism UI effects display correctly
Logo loads from external URL
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
